goal: Implement CI/CD & Deployment - GitHub Actions, production Docker, Vault, SSL/TLS, monitoring, scaling, DR

tasks.description: Create GitHub Actions CI workflow (test, build, scan, deploy)
Set up production Docker Compose configuration
Configure Vault for production secrets management
Configure Nginx reverse proxy with SSL/TLS (Let's Encrypt)
Set up database backup and restore procedures (pg_dump, WAL archiving)
Implement health check endpoints and monitoring alerts
Configure load balancing and horizontal scaling
Set up Prometheus metrics endpoint and Grafana dashboards
Create disaster recovery runbook and multi-region plan
